messages.text: BL-473 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-473" (or "reject BL-473 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Pipeline board: show EVERY ticket physically in backlog/active/ — a not-yet-held active ticket renders in a 'not started' state instead of vanishing (be as good as the PWA for active tickets)
How it works: A held active ticket still appears at its role's stage
